messages.content:
i want to reply to this  Dear Hazem and Nour, 

I am writing to you to officially complain about Dalal - Cleaner in Amman office, I was talking to her to ask her about an issue happened 2 days ago in the CBO in Amman, after I received a feedback from Rania and Diaa, they reported to me that the HEad of the CBO was talking in disrespectful way to her because she was collecting the leftovers of food, during the initiative, where the head of the CBO was asking her not to collect the food, to follow up on thaat case, I called yesterday the head of the CBO, who So I called Dalal today to ask her about what happened, and I was telling her that what was done by the head of the CBO was not acceptable, as well what we have done was not acceptable as well, she was criticizing me in disrespectful way, while I was asking her to leave the office. to end the discussion 

This is not the first time for Dala to speak in disrespectful way, and to lie in a way put us in a confusing situation internally and externally. 

I will never accept this attitude to be used with me. 

thanks 

Hiba

Dear Hiba,

Thank you for bringing this issue to my attention. I understand your frustration regarding the disrespectful behavior of Dalal, the cleaner in the Amman office. It is unacceptable for anyone, including the Head of the CBO, to speak disrespectfully to colleagues.

I appreciate your efforts in following up on the situation and speaking with Dalal about what happened. However, it is disappointing to hear that she responded in a disrespectful manner towards you. It is important for all employees to maintain a professional and respectful attitude in the workplace.

Furthermore, it is concerning that Dalal has exhibited disrespectful behavior in the past and has also been dishonest, which has caused confusion both internally and externally. This kind of behavior is not conducive to a positive and productive work environment.

I want to assure you that I take this matter seriously and will address it accordingly. I will personally investigate this issue further and take appropriate action to ensure that such behavior is not repeated. I apologize for any discomfort or inconvenience this situation may have caused you.

Thank you for bringing this to my attention, and please do not hesitate to reach out if you have any further concerns or if there is anything else I can assist you with.

Sincerely,
[Your Name]
i want to add to the above that its not your responsibility to talk to dalal should you inform her manager or the HR

Dear Hiba,

Thank you for your concern and suggestion. You are correct that it is not your responsibility to directly address the issue with Dalal as it falls outside your role. I appreciate your efforts in attempting to address the matter, but it is more appropriate for her manager or the HR department to handle such concerns.

Please be assured that I will inform Dalal's manager and the HR department about the situation promptly. They will be responsible for investigating the issue further and taking appropriate action. 

Once again, I apologize for any inconvenience caused by this situation, and I appreciate your understanding and cooperation in allowing the proper channels to handle this matter. If you have any further concerns or questions, please feel free to let me know.

Sincerely,
[Your Name]
please write the above in different way

Dear Hiba,

I appreciate your understanding and collaboration in addressing the situation regarding Dalal's disrespectful behavior. It is important to clarify that it is not your direct responsibility to communicate with Dalal about this matter.

Given the nature of the issue, it would be more appropriate for her manager or the HR department to intervene and handle the necessary actions. Therefore, I will take immediate steps to inform Dalal's manager and the HR department about the incident in question. They will be able to conduct a thorough investigation and take appropriate measures to address the situation.

I sincerely apologize for any confusion or discomfort caused by my previous suggestion. Your input and concern are valued, and I assure you that I am committed to resolving this matter in the proper way.

If you have any further concerns or questions, please do not hesitate to reach out. Thank you for your understanding and cooperation throughout this process.

Warm regards,

[Your Name]

please rewrite this Dear Hiba,

I am sorry to hear that you had a negative encounter with Dalal, the cleaner in our Amman office. I understand your frustration and anger with her behavior and attitude.

However, I would like to remind you that it is not your responsibility to talk to Dalal or give her any comment about her performance or conduct. You should report this issue to your manager or to the HR department, and let them handle it according to the company policy and procedures.

By talking to Dalal directly, you may risk escalating the situation or creating more conflict. You may also violate the company rules or the labor law, which could have serious consequences for you and the organization.

Therefore, I kindly ask you to refrain from contacting Dalal or any other cleaner in the future, unless it is absolutely necessary and authorized by your manager or HR. Please respect their role and authority, and trust them to deal with any problems or complaints that may arise.

Thank you for your understanding and cooperation.

Sincerely,
[Your Name]

please rewrite this Dear Hiba,

I am sorry to hear that you had a negative encounter with Dalal, the cleaner in our Amman office. I understand your frustration and anger with her behavior and attitude.

However, I would like to remind you that it is not your responsibility to talk to Dalal or give her any comment about her performance or conduct. You should report this issue to your manager or to the HR department, and let them handle it according to the company policy and procedures.

By talking to Dalal directly, you may risk escalating the situation or creating more conflict. You may also violate the company rules or the labor law, which could have serious consequences for you and the organization.

Therefore, I kindly ask you to refrain from contacting Dalal or any other cleaner in the future, unless it is absolutely necessary and authorized by your manager or HR. Please respect their role and authority, and trust them to deal with any problems or complaints that may arise.

Thank you for your understanding and cooperation.

Dear Hiba,

I hope this message finds you well. I wanted to address the issue regarding your encounter with Dalal, the cleaner in our Amman office. I am sorry to hear about the negative experience you had and understand your frustration.

However, it is important to remember that addressing issues with employees, such as Dalal, falls under the jurisdiction of their respective managers or the HR department. As such, I kindly request that you refrain from directly contacting Dalal or providing feedback on her performance or conduct.

Engaging with Dalal directly may inadvertently escalate the situation or create further conflicts. It is also essential to abide by company policies and labor laws to ensure a harmonious and compliant work environment.

Should you have any concerns or complaints regarding Dalal or any other employee, I urge you to report the issue to your manager or the HR department. They possess the expertise and authority to handle such matters effectively, adhering to company guidelines and protocols.

I appreciate your understanding and cooperation in this regard. Your commitment to respecting the roles and responsibilities of the relevant parties will contribute to a smooth resolution of the matter.

Thank you for your attention to this matter.

Best regards,
[Your Name]

please write me an email to kenza the direct manager of diya tell her that after diya ask me that i will pick up my son from the school and he tell that he will leave during the break and may take more than 30 min what should to submit the extra on 30 min then i told him to inform u plus to send an email to me about his situation the thing is that after many times i remind him to send an email and recent remind was today he refuse to send the email the point here is once the HR request something related to HR process

Subject: Request for Diya's Compliance with HR Processes

Dear Kenza,

I hope this email finds you well. I am writing to bring an issue to your attention regarding Diya, one of the employees on your team. It pertains to his compliance with HR processes, specifically his failure to follow through with a request made by HR.

Recently, Diya informed me that he needed to leave work during the break to pick up his son from school. He mentioned that it might take more than the usual 30 minutes, and asked me about the appropriate steps to submit the extra time. I advised him to inform you, his direct manager, and requested that he also send an email to me outlining his situation.

Despite my reminders, both oral and written, including today's recent reminder, Diya has consistently refused to send the required email. This lack of cooperation is concerning, particularly when HR has requested specific actions related to HR processes.

Ensuring adherence to HR processes and guidelines is crucial for maintaining consistency, fairness, and accountability within our organization. It is important that all employees, including Diya, understand the significance of following these procedures for the smooth functioning of our HR operations.

I kindly request that you have a conversation with Diya to emphasize the importance of compliance with HR processes. Please remind him of his responsibility to promptly and accurately complete any required documentation or communication as instructed by HR. Additionally, it may be beneficial to provide him with a clear understanding of the consequences that non-compliance may have on the organization and his own professional standing.

Thank you for addressing this matter promptly. Should you require any further information or assistance, please do not hesitate to contact me. I greatly appreciate your attention to this issue and your commitment to fostering a culture of compliance and accountability within your team.

Best regards,

[Your Name]
[Your Position]
[Your Contact Information]
please write the above email in short and direct and professional words

Subject: Non-Compliance with HR Process: Diya

Dear Kenza,

I hope this email finds you well. I wanted to bring to your attention a matter regarding Diya, one of your team members. It pertains to a lack of compliance with HR processes on his part.

Diya had requested to leave work during the break to pick up his son from school, mentioning that he might exceed the usual 30-minute timeframe. In response, I advised him to inform you and to send me an email outlining his situation.

Despite multiple reminders, both verbal and written, Diya has consistently refused to send the required email. This demonstrates a disregard for HR requests and undermines our efforts to maintain consistency and accountability within the organization.

I kindly ask that you have a conversation with Diya, emphasizing the importance of compliance with HR processes. Please remind him of his responsibility to promptly complete any necessary documentation or communication as instructed by HR. Additionally, it may be helpful to discuss the possible consequences of non-compliance, both for the organization and for his professional reputation.

Thank you for addressing this matter promptly. If you require any further information or assistance, please feel free to reach out. I appreciate your attention to this issue and your dedication to fostering a culture of compliance and accountability within your team.

Best regards,

[Your Name]
[Your Position]
[Your Contact Information]
please write the above email in short and direct and professional words

Subject: Urgent: Non-compliance with HR Process - Diya

Dear Kenza,

I need to bring a pressing matter to your attention regarding Diya, one of your team members. It pertains to his failure to comply with HR processes.

Diya requested to leave work during the break to pick up his son from school, stating that it may exceed the usual 30-minute timeframe. I instructed him to inform you and send me an email explaining his situation.

Despite repeated reminders, verbal and written, Diya has consistently refused to send the required email. This non-compliance undermines our efforts to maintain consistency and accountability within the organization.

I urge you to address this issue urgently with Diya, stressing the importance of complying with HR processes, including prompt completion of necessary documentation and communication. Please highlight the potential consequences of non-compliance, both for the organization and his professional reputation.

I appreciate your prompt attention to this matter. Should you require further information or assistance, please let me know. Thank you for your commitment to upholding a culture of compliance and accountability within your team.

Best regards,

[Your Name]
[Your Position]
[Your Contact Information]
i want to add to above email i advise him to inform you and submit the exceed on the 30 minutes as personal leave plus send me an email regarding his situation

Subject: Urgent: Non-compliance with HR Process - Diya

Dear Kenza,

I need to bring a pressing matter to your attention regarding Diya, one of your team members. It pertains to his failure to comply with HR processes.

Diya had previously informed me about the need to leave work during the break to pick up his son from school, mentioning that it may exceed the usual 30-minute timeframe. I advised him to inform you and submit the additional time as personal leave. Furthermore, I requested that he send me an email explaining his situation.

Despite repeated reminders, both verbal and written, Diya has consistently refused to send the required email. This non-compliance undermines our efforts to maintain consistency and accountability within the organization.

I urge you to address this issue urgently with Diya, stressing the importance of complying with HR processes. Kindly advise him to promptly inform you about any absences or deviations from the regular schedule, submitting any exceeded time as personal leave. Additionally, emphasize the necessity of him sending me an email outlining his situation. 

I appreciate your prompt attention to this matter. Should you require further information or assistance, please let me know. Thank you for your commitment to upholding a culture of compliance and accountability within your team.

Best regards,

[Your Name]
[Your Position]
[Your Contact Information]

please write me this Dear Abdullah, 

Based on the interview result and the panel recommendation and after completing the reference check satisfactory for the social worker (maternity cover) position in karak Ala’a Maaitah is selected to cover this duration and she will start on Monday 18 of Sep till 5th of Nov 

Regards

Dear Abdullah,

I hope this email finds you well. I would like to inform you that based on the interview result and the panel's recommendation, as well as satisfactory completion of the reference check, we have selected Ala'a Maaitah for the social worker (maternity cover) position in Karak.

Ala'a Maaitah will commence her employment on Monday, September 18th and will continue in this role until November 5th. We believe that Ala'a's skills and experience make her well-suited to fulfill the responsibilities of the position during this period.

If you have any questions or need further information, please feel free to reach out. Thank you for your understanding and support in this selection process.

Best regards,

[Your Name]
[Your Position]
[Your Contact Information]
